title: Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)
content:

{{Quote|That was for my squad.|Sarge, after killing the mercenary responsible for killing his squad|<ref name="Package" />}}
A '''[[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]]''' was an elite [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] unit within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] that operated during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Comprised of four [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], the squad was led by [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]]. Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the Clone Wars at [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], beginning [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]-spanning war between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the squad was tasked with a [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|mission]] to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] where they were to recover a [[The Package|diplomatic package]] that had been bound for [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] from a gang of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] who had stolen it with the intent to sell the item to the Confederacy. During the course of the mission, three of the four [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the Trandoshan [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]; the squad's leader was the only survivor, killing the last of the Trandoshans and recovering the package as ordered.

==History==
{{Quote|Last night, Trandoshan bounty hunters intercepted a package of ''extreme diplomatic'' importance, intended for ''Supreme Chancellor Palpatine''. They intend to sell it to the Separatists. You are going to make sure that situation does not occur.|[[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|ARC trooper officer]]|<ref name="Package" />}}
[[File:Sarge_briefing.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Both squads being briefed for the mission to Ord Mantell]]
The four members of the squad were [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], born on the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]],<ref name="CloneTrooper">{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}}</ref> located in the remote [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Trained as [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] and deployed in opposition to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] as part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] following the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="Package" /> the squad served as part of the Grand [[Army/Legends|Army's]] [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] with their [[Commando/Legends|commando]] comrades,<ref name="GttGAR" /> and operated out of [[Arca Company Barracks]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TZ" /> Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the squad's [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] were summoned to the headquarters of [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]], along with the commandos of [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|another squad]]. There, they were briefed by an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|intelligence officer]] who informed the squad that a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] [[The Package|package]] from [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] intended to be delivered to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], had in fact been stolen by a group of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. The [[Color/Legends|yellow]]-marked ARC [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] tasked the squad with traveling to the planet [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], where the bounty hunters intended to sell the package to the Confederacy, and [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|recover the package]] from the Trandoshans.<ref name="Package" />

[[File:OrdMantellMission-ThePackage.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The squad engages the gang of Trandoshan bounty hunters]]
On Ord Mantell, the other squad ambushed the Trandoshan [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] on the street, but were [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the Trandoshans threw a number of [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] from their [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] while attempting to escape. At the order of the squad's leader,<ref name="Package" /> [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]],<ref name="Orders" /> the squad's ordnance specialist destroyed one of the Trandoshan [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] with a [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]], while the [[Unidentified clone commando sniper|squad sniper]] killed the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of a second speeder, causing it to crash. As the final speeder fled the scene with the package onboard, the squad rushed to pursue, boarding a speeder piloted by the squad's fourth man and tracking the bounty hunters toward the industrial yards. Arriving at an open courtyard, the squad split up to search for the Trandoshans and it was the commando who had piloted their speeder who came across them: the Trandoshans were meeting with a squad of Confederacy [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], who opened [[Blaster/Legends|fire]] on the soldier, killing him.<ref name="Package" />

The squad leader quickly threw an [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|EMP grenade]] through the door, shorting out the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1]] and [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2]] battle [[Droid/Legends|droids]], before the squad poured in and destroyed the damaged droids with their [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m]] [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]]. Once the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were destroyed, the commandos set their sights on a [[Blast door/Legends|blast door]] at the rear of the building and the squad demolitions expert set a [[Detonation pack|charge]] on the door that blew an entrance for the soldiers.<ref name="Package" />

The surprised Trandoshans rushed behind their speeder for cover as the clone commandos stormed the room with weapons firing. The squad's explosives man was shot and killed by one of the bounty hunters, but a [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] from the squad leader left the Trandoshans dead. However, the Trandoshan leader had been hiding, and once the commandos' guard had been dropped, he struck from behind: firing a shot from his [[Wrist blaster/Legends|wrist blaster]], he struck the ordnance module on the squad [[Sniper/Legends|sniper's]] [[Backpack/Legends|pack]], detonating it and killing its wearer. As the squad leader had been knocked down by the blast as well, the lead Trandoshan attempted to flee again, but the surviving commando jumped onto his back, dragging him down. Holding him by the neck, the commando extended the [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] on his right hand's [[Gauntlet vibroblade/Legends|knuckle plate]] and stabbed the bounty hunter in the chest, uttering that it was revenge for his squad's deaths. The squad leader then retrieved the package the clones had been sent after, and solemnly left to deliver it to Republic Intelligence as instructed.<ref name="Package" />

The package was later delivered to Chancellor Palpatine, who regarded the item inside as little more than an unimportant trinket, which he had [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] [[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chair]], [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]], relegate to a storage closet with a number of other similar [[Politics/Legends|political]] gifts.<ref name="Package" /> With his squad dead, Sarge3 was reassigned to a new commando unit, [[Aiwha Squad]], which he would lead up to the end of the Clone Wars<ref name="Orders" /> and the [[Declaration of a New Order|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Order 66: Destroy All Jedi">{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In [[2005]], the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 3]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] introduced two squads of Republic commandos with the story ''[[The Package (comic story)|The Package]]''.<ref name="Package" /> One squad's leader would go on to make a further appearance in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 4]] of the ''Clone Wars Adventures'' comic story, [[Orders (comic story)|''Orders'']], where he was identified as Sarge.<ref name="Orders" />

==Appearances==
